title: gardenia erubescens
intro: Gardenia erubescens, also known as the 'Red Gardenia' or 'Purple Gardenia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Gardenia erubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
